seoTitle: PageTeardown — A 10-min recorded landing-page teardown with 7 fixes
seoDescription: A 10-min recorded landing-page teardown with 7 fixes. Built for indie founders, marketers, course creators. From $49.

faq.a: Indie founders, marketers, course creators. If that's you and "they suspect their page leaks money but can't see why" sounds familiar, this was built for your exact situation.

faq.q: Why would I pay for this?
faq.a: Specific conversion fixes from an outside eye.

faq.q: How fast do I get it?
faq.a: Within 48–72 hours of ordering. You'll get a confirmation immediately and the deliverable by email.
One free revision round is included. If the deliverable misses the agreed scope, you get a full refund — no argument.

validationMetric: Send 50 personalised outreach touches; target 1+ paid order or 3+ booked calls in 14 days
deploymentTarget: Vercel (static) — primary; Cloudflare Pages / Netlify alternates
killCriteria: 0 paid orders AND <2 booked calls after 100 outreach touches in 14 days
biggestRisk: Fulfillment time caps scale; low cold-reply rates; you trade hours for money until productised further
first10: DM/cold-email 30-50 ideal-fit businesses with a free mini-teardown; post the offer in 2 niche communities
